<!-- Design language DL-04 SHILPA token block -->

## Design language: SHILPA (DL-04)

**Craft every detail.** India: Craftsmanship and structure.

Status: adopted. Occasions: technical packs, procedures, job cards, commissioning annexes.

### Design laws

- Precision before aesthetics
- Standards are sacred
- Components align
- Geometry is functional
- IDs remain machine-readable

### Constitution (deterministic communication contract)

| Dimension | Value |
|---|---|
| narrative_style | evidence-first |
| density | scientific |
| annotation_policy | full |
| legend_policy | level-key-allowed |
| highlight_policy | single |
| decision_style | options |
| reading_time | session |
| charts_per_page | 4 |

### Palette

| Role | Hex |
|---|---|
| background | `#FBFDFF` |
| panel | `#EDF3F7` |
| ink | `#143D59` |
| body | `#33424E` |
| hairline | `#C6D5E0` |
| gridline | `#E7EEF4` |
| primary | `#1B6E8F` |
| muted | `#C6D5E0` |
| positive | `#2E6E4E` |
| negative | `#9E2B25` |
| warning | `#B54708` |

### Fonts

- display: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 600
- body: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400

### Chrome

kicker: false, eyebrow: false
